data.title: Disney's new CEO, Josh D'Amaro, faces challenges as Trump administration intensifies scrutiny.
data.description: Josh D’Amaro, who assumed the position in February, is tasked with guiding Disney amidst heightened scrutiny from the president.

data.title: UAE departure weakens OPEC's power as another major exit. Trend continues with significant departures from oil cartel.
data.description: The departure of the United Arab Emirates stands out as one of the most notable exits from the oil cartel in recent times.

data.title: Judge inquires if Justice Department will challenge Trump's $10B lawsuit against IRS for revealing his tax returns.
data.description: A judge from the federal court has directed the Justice Department to clarify its stance on challenging President Trump's lawsuit worth $10 billion against the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) regarding the release of his tax returns.

data.title: Federal Reserve April meeting: Interest rates likely staying stable, Jerome Powell's last meeting as chair.
data.description: It is anticipated that the Federal Reserve of the United States will maintain the current interest rates at Jerome H. Powell's last meeting as chair.

data.title: U.K. Enterprises Expand Governed Salesforce AI Adoption
data.description: In London, according to ISG, U.K. companies are enlarging the overhaul of Salesforce setups while integrating self-governing procedures and updating customer services. This shift towards autonomous workflows and modernization of operations is gaining momentum, highlighting a growing trend among businesses to enhance their Salesforce environments.

data.title: Ooma AirDial Enhances Remote Device Management with New Monitoring, Visibility and Analytics Features
data.description: Ooma, Inc., a prominent communications solutions provider for businesses and consumers, unveiled advancements to its Remote Device Management (RDM) platform for Ooma AirDial® in Sunnyvale, California. Specifically targeting POTS replacement, the upgrades within AirDial 2 aim to offer enhanced visibility, control, and reliability for key analog devices. The new features cater to ensuring improved monitoring and management of critical operations, catering to organizations seeking to optimize their systems. These developments underline Ooma’s commitment to delivering innovative solutions tailored to the evolving needs of businesses and consumers in the communication sector.

data.title: Parents are pushing for more control over digital tools in schools, winning rollbacks across cities like Salt Lake City and New York.
data.description: Parents across the country, from Salt Lake City to New York City, are calling for increased control over the digital tools provided to their children in schools. This widespread demand underscores the importance of parental involvement in shaping the educational experience, with families advocating for a greater role in decision-making regarding technology use in schools. The movement is gaining momentum as more parents seek to ensure that their children have safe and effective digital learning environments.

data.title: Dunkin’® Brings Warmer-Weather Sips into Focus with New Refreshers, a First-of-Its-Kind Dirty Soda and All-New Coffee Chillers
data.description: Dunkin’ is launching a menu for the spring and summer seasons, including new drinks and bakery items available across the nation starting today. The highlights of the menu include Black Cherry and Limeade Dunkin’ Refreshers, Dirty Soda, beverages with OREO® cookies, revamped Coffee Chillers, and fruit punch bakery items. The seasonal offerings aim to complement the warmer days ahead with a variety of options for customers to choose from.

data.title: Kyivstar and VEON Fulfill Commitment to Invest $1 Billion Investment Program in Ukraine, Exceeding Target by 30%
data.description: Ukraine has announced a significant multi-year investment in infrastructure and digital services to enhance its connectivity, energy resilience, and digital economy. The investment is targeted at improving various sectors, with a focus on boosting connectivity and digital capabilities. This initiative aims to enhance Ukraine's position in the global digital economy and ensure the country's energy security. The investment amounts to a substantial sum, reflecting the government's commitment to modernize key sectors and promote growth and resilience. Through this effort, Ukraine seeks to leverage technology and infrastructure to propel economic development and enhance its competitiveness on the international stage.

data.title: VEON and Kyivstar Fulfill Commitment to Invest  USD 1 Billion in Ukraine over 2023-2027 Ahead of Schedule
data.description: On April 29, 2026, VEON Ltd., a global digital operator listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol VEON, declared that they have successfully met their investment commitment to Ukraine earlier than expected. VEON, which is the parent company of Kyivstar Group Ltd. (Nasdaq: KYIV; KYIVW), Ukraine's major digital operator, along with Kyivstar have outperformed their USD 1 billion investment pledge for the period of 2023-2027 by a notable 30%. The accomplishment showcases the companies' dedication to supporting and expanding their presence in Ukraine's digital market.

data.title: NVIDIA's BioNeMo boosts biomolecular modeling with context parallelism, overcoming memory limits for massive systems. Learn more.
data.description: BioNeMo, a product by NVIDIA, has introduced context parallelism to facilitate biomolecular modeling of large systems. This innovation overcomes GPU memory limitations and enables the processing of massive amounts of data for research and development. This advancement allows for the acceleration of simulations and analyses for various scientific applications.

data.title: RedStone addresses $30B liquidity gap in DeFi lending with new settlement layer, boosting collateral potential. Discover more.
data.description: RedStone has introduced a new settlement layer to tackle the liquidity imbalance for tokenized Real World Assets (RWAs) within Decentralized Finance (DeFi) platforms. This innovation is set to unleash a staggering $30 billion in collateral potential. This development aims to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of DeFi ecosystems by bridging the liquidity gap for RWAs in the tokenized form.
